title: aglaia elaeagnoidea var. courtallensis
intro: Aglaia elaeagnoidea var. courtallensis, also known as the Courtallensian aglaia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae. It is used in traditional medicine and has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, prevent infections, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. Aglaia elaeagnoidea var. courtallensis can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
